title: Update default WhatsApp reminder message template

requirements.text: Update the default WhatsApp reminder message template used by the "Send outstanding via WhatsApp" action so the message starts with a greeting and includes the selected customer’s name and formatted outstanding balance amount, using this exact template text (with placeholders replaced at runtime): "नमस्कार (Customer Name) आपली खाते बाकी लवकरात लवकर जमा करून सहकार्य करावे. (Outstanding Balance)".

quotes: set whatsapp massage  नमस्कार (Customer Name)                  आपली खाते बाकी लवकरात लवकर जमा करून सहकार्य करावे.                   (Outstanding Balance)

acceptanceCriteria: When a user selects "Send outstanding via WhatsApp" for a customer with a valid mobile number and outstandingBalance > 0, the WhatsApp message edit dialog opens with the message pre-filled using the new template.
The pre-filled message replaces "(Customer Name)" with the selected customer’s name.
The pre-filled message replaces "(Outstanding Balance)" with the customer’s outstanding balance formatted as INR (consistent with current formatting behavior).
The user can still edit the message in the dialog and the edited text is used to generate the WhatsApp deep link.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only components).
Do not edit files listed in frontend.immutablePaths from SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
nonGoals: Do not add third-party WhatsApp APIs or any server-side WhatsApp sending.
Do not introduce new authentication methods beyond Internet Identity.
Do not add a full settings screen for editing templates unless explicitly required.
